action.reasoning: Observation: test_preprocess fully succeeds with sequential processors (Rename, AddBatch, Pi0NewLine, Tokenizer, Device, Normalizer) + language merge after mutation steps (preserves observation key, uses exact PIL 224x224 for base_0_rgb/left_wrist_0_rgb/right_wrist_0_rgb from rgb[0/2/3], padded 32D state/action, complementary_data+task, dummy_action); test_obs reaches predict but truncated predict.py causes 'All image features missing' ValueError -> fallback (all evals 0.0). RecordingEvaluator, PI0 load, processors list, _action_to_ee, chunking solid. Analysis: Exact working batch+deepcopy+merge-after-Pi0NewLine/Tokenizer from diagnostic resolves training-pipeline mutation (partial dict from lang steps); full non-truncated predict.py using this in _safe_preprocess + _prepare_observation (map rgb views correctly, state pad, dummy_action) + policy.predict_action_chunk+postprocess+pending queue + tuned delta bridge will eliminate fallback and run real PI0 actions. Matches intended Pi0 track (LIBERO-pretrained on similar pick/place should give >0 success on add_condiment/select once end-to-end; first non-zero expected). Decision: Overwrite predict.py with COMPLETE clean non-truncated code (exact diagnostic pattern + full methods + error recovery only on true exceptions, view mapping rgb[0]=base/rgb[2]=left/rgb[3]=right_wrist, chunking, no syntax issues). Keep tests. Run python test_preprocess.py && python test_obs.py (expect FULL SEQUENTIAL PREPROCESS SUCCEEDED + real policy actions in mock without fallback/image-missing). Then submit_eval on base for first non-zero success_rate before LoRA.
